endpoints.name: Image contains nudity or sexually explicit content? [ image_url -> id ]
endpoints.description: Creates a new adult_content task that tells the if the image has nudity or sexual content.

endpoints.name: Gets the adult_content task [ id -> adult content task ]
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.

endpoints.name: Create an artistic image [ image_url, style_url -> id ]
endpoints.description: Given an image content and a style image create a new stylized image of the content.

endpoints.name: Gets a artistic image by task id [ id -> artistic image task ]
endpoints.description: The artistic_image will have the urls of the stylized images.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.

endpoints.name: What is that object? [ image_url -> id ]
endpoints.description: Creates a new detect object task that recognizes the object in the image.

endpoints.name: Gets the detect_object task [ id -> detect object task]
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.

endpoints.name: Find all faces in the image [ image_url -> id ]
endpoints.description: Get a list of all the locations of the faces in the image.

endpoints.name: Gets the face task [ id -> face task ]
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.

endpoints.name: How old is the person in the image? [ image_url -> id ]
endpoints.description: Creates a new face age task that approximates the age of the person in the image.

endpoints.name: Gets the face_age task [ id -> face age task ]
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid.
